Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the Cable Television Networks (Amendment) Rules, 1995. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cable Television Networks Rules, 1994, in Form 1, after serial number 5, the following shall be inserted, namely:— “5A—Date from which the cable television network is operating/proposed to be set up.” [File No. 9|2|95-PBC] NAVIN CFIAWLA. Jt. Secy. Foot Note :—Principal notification has been published vide G.S.R. 729(E) dated 29th September, 1994. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press. Rina Road1.
